summary: Captured one bounded BusinessFlow-to-FireFlow cookie handoff slice from allowed source and log targets. The strongest preserved path is SSOLogin.php passing AFF_COOKIE into FireFlow and accepting BFCookie back, plus runtime windows showing storeFireflowCookie immediately after FireFlow completes an AFA login and before later refresh traffic.
follow_up_recommendations: Correlate the preserved localhost callers (FireFlowAffApi/NoAuth/CommandsDispatcher, FireFlow/XML/CommandsDispatcher, /afa/php/ws.php, /afa/php/commands.php) with any broader orchestration traces outside this observe-only slice.

If a higher delegation tier becomes available, instrument the duplicated query-string construction around storeFireflowCookie and bridge/refresh to determine whether the repeated session/domain parameters are cosmetic logging artifacts or part of the live request assembly.
